scripts.text:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources where name = 'RAW_DATA_BRONZE')
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE RAW_DATA_BRONZE 
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'abfss://source-data@indtechjobprojectstorage.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze'
);

ALTER DATABASE Ind_Tech_Job_Proj_DB COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AI_SC_UTF8;


--------Creating External Data Source ---------
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources where name = 'SILVER_DATA')
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE SILVER_DATA
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'abfss://source-data@indtechjobprojectstorage.dfs.core.windows.net/silver'
);

--------Create External File Format ---------

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'MyParquetFormat' )
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT MyParquetFormat
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET
);

------create external table ---------
IF EXISTS (
    SELECT * FROM sys.external_tables st 
    JOIN  sys.external_data_sources sd 
    ON st.data_source_id = sd.data_source_id AND st.name = 'indian_tech_jobs_2026' and sd.name = 'SILVER_DATA')
BEGIN
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE indian_tech_jobs_2026
END;
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE indian_tech_jobs_2026
WITH (
    DATA_SOURCE = SILVER_DATA,
    FILE_FORMAT = MyParquetFormat,
    LOCATION = 'indian_tech_jobs_2026/'
)
AS
WITH SourceData AS
(
    SELECT *,
           COALESCE(
               NULLIF(LOWER(TRIM(job_url)), 'N/A'),
               LOWER(TRIM(job_title))
               + '|'
               + LOWER(TRIM(company_name))
               + '|'
               + LOWER(TRIM(location))
               + '|'
               + LOWER(TRIM(experience_raw))
           ) AS dedupe_key
    FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK '/indian_tech_jobs_2026.csv',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'RAW_DATA_BRONZE',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) as src
),
Deduplicated AS
(
    SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY dedupe_key
               ORDER BY job_id
           ) AS rn
    FROM SourceData
)
SELECT
    TRY_CAST(TRIM(CAST(job_id AS VARCHAR(50))) AS BIGINT) AS job_id,
    TRIM(job_title) AS job_title,

    CASE
        WHEN company_name IN ('.', '-', '', 'N/A')
            THEN 'unknown'
        ELSE LOWER(TRIM(company_name))
    END AS company_name,

    TRY_CAST(company_rating AS FLOAT) AS company_rating,

    CASE
        WHEN location LIKE '%Bengaluru%' THEN 'Bangalore'
        WHEN location LIKE '%Bangalore%' THEN 'Bangalore'
        ELSE location
    END AS location,

    primary_city,
    role_category,

    TRY_CAST(experience_min_yrs AS INT) AS experience_min_yrs,
    TRY_CAST(experience_max_yrs AS INT) AS experience_max_yrs,

    TRY_CAST(salary_min_lpa AS FLOAT) AS salary_min_lpa,
    TRY_CAST(salary_max_lpa AS FLOAT) AS salary_max_lpa,

    salary_disclosed,

    LOWER(TRIM(skills_required)) AS skills_required,

    TRY_CAST(skills_count AS INT) AS skills_count,

    work_mode,
    company_size_bucket,

    TRY_CAST(scraped_at AS DATE) AS scraped_at,

    experience_tier,
    skill_domain,
    salary_midpoint_lpa
FROM Deduplicated
WHERE rn = 1;

-- Data Analysis

-- Data Aggragation 
-- Data Table,view ,procedure Creation 
-- Save Data in Gold Layer 



--------Creating External Data Source ---------
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources where name = 'GOLD_DATA')
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE GOLD_DATA
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'abfss://source-data@indtechjobprojectstorage.dfs.core.windows.net/gold'
);


------create external table ---------
IF EXISTS (
    SELECT * FROM sys.external_tables st 
    JOIN  sys.external_data_sources sd 
    ON st.data_source_id = sd.data_source_id AND st.name = 'gold_job_postings' and sd.name = 'GOLD_DATA')
BEGIN
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE gold_job_postings
END;
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold_job_postings
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'gold_job_postings/',
    DATA_SOURCE = GOLD_DATA,
    FILE_FORMAT = MyParquetFormat
)
AS
SELECT
    job_id,
    job_title,
    role_category,
    company_name,
    company_rating,
    company_size_bucket,
    location,
    primary_city,
    experience_min_yrs,
    experience_max_yrs,
    CASE 
        WHEN experience_min_yrs = 0 AND experience_max_yrs = 0 
        THEN 0
        ELSE (experience_min_yrs + experience_max_yrs)/2.0
    END AS avg_experience,
    salary_min_lpa,
    salary_max_lpa,
    salary_midpoint_lpa AS avg_salary,
  CASE
    WHEN salary_min_lpa = 0
         AND salary_max_lpa = 0
    THEN 'Unknown'
    WHEN salary_midpoint_lpa/2.0 >= 30
    THEN 'Yes'
    ELSE 'No'
END AS high_salary,
    salary_disclosed,
    skills_required,
    skills_count,
    work_mode,
    scraped_at,
    experience_tier,
    skill_domain
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK '/indian_tech_jobs_2026',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'SILVER_DATA',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS [result];
